---
title: "Geospatial analysis"
---

What tool?

- ArcGIS pro
- QGIS

AGO layers vs. local layers

– very much ‘where are my files’ reinforcement like Unix Shell

Example analysis: which parts of campus are least served by the bike path network?

Data analysis: 

- buffering
- interpolation
- zonal statistics
- raster calculation

Potential simple analysis as end product  (this section should be moved to 3) 
- Zonal statistics 
- Count number of points within a polygon 
- Heatmap from points 
- Buffering

Heat map
